feature: ReturnOrderBy1 - Order by a single variable (correct order of values according to their type)

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy1 - Order by a single variable (correct order of values according to their type)-[1] ORDER BY should order booleans in the expected order
scenarios.description: [1] ORDER BY should order booleans in the expected order
scenarios.query:
UNWIND [true, false] AS bools
RETURN bools
ORDER BY bools
scenarios.skip_reason: parser: UNWIND keyword not yet in grammar

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy1 - Order by a single variable (correct order of values according to their type)-[11] ORDER BY should order distinct types in the expected order
scenarios.description: [11] ORDER BY should order distinct types in the expected order
scenarios.query:
MATCH p = (n:N)-[r:REL]->()
UNWIND [n, r, p, 1.5, ['list'], 'text', null, false, 0.0 / 0.0, {a: 'map'}] AS types
RETURN types
ORDER BY types
scenarios.skip_reason: parser: UNWIND keyword not yet in grammar
